nodes.name: 理查德·鮑德勒·夏普
nodes.summary: 理查德·鮑德勒·夏普是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联33种鸟类，包括白眉田雞、Bates's nightjar、Bates's swift等33种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: Lagden's bushshrike
nodes.summary: Lagden's bushshrike（Lagden's bushshrike，学名 Malaconotus lagdeni），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于理查德·鮑德勒·夏普，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Keulemans]] | status = NT | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Malaconotus | species = lagdeni | authority = (Sharpe, 1884) | synonyms = }} Lagden's bushshrike (Malaconotus lagdeni) is a bird species in the bushshrike family (Malaconotidae) native to Africa

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests in west Africa to an elevation of around 700 m, and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests in Rwanda, Uganda and the Democratic Republic of Congo at an elevation of 2100 to 2800 m. Classified in the IUCN Red List as Near Threatened, it is becoming rare due to habitat loss. One of the 1,487 bird species of eastern Africa, it is considered to be a "very rare mountain forest species". It is one of the 235 different species sighted at Kyabobo National Park.{{cite book |url=https://portals.iucn.org/library/sites/library/files/documents/2010-073.pdf |pages=16–17 |title=Parks and Reserves of Ghana: Management Effectiveness Assessment of Protected Areas |quote=There are at least 235 different species of birds in Kyabobo
